summary:
Infrastructure compliance escalation — explicit control failure detail for client remediation.
NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 (NIST-CSF-2.0) control PR.AA.01 — Identities and credentials are managed: non-conformant. Triggered by: rule identity-mfa-enrollment; expected "100% of users enrolled in MFA", observed "72% enrolled"; entity /subscriptions/sub-contoso/policyAssignments/identity-mfa-enforcement
ISO/IEC 27001 (ISO-27001) control A.9.2.1 — User registration and de-registration: non-conformant. Triggered by: rule identity-mfa-enrollment; expected "100% of users enrolled in MFA", observed "72% enrolled"; entity /subscriptions/sub-contoso/policyAssignments/identity-mfa-enforcement

mitigationPlan.requirementTitle: Mandatory MFA for all privileged and standard users
acceptanceCriteria: 100% of active-eligible users enrolled in MFA within 30 days of account creation (user-account-created states excluded from risk denominator)
Users cannot sign in until MFA device registration is complete — registration prompt enforced at login
Privileged roles use JIT elevation with maximum 4-hour sessions
Guest users blocked from administrative roles
Conditional access policies enforce compliant device state

vendorDeliverableProfile.summary: Microsoft Entra ID and Conditional Access must deliver MFA for all users, JIT for privileged roles, guest restrictions, and compliant-device enforcement per approved parameters.

clientActions.title: 100% of active-eligible users enrolled in MFA within 30 days of account creation (user-account-created states excluded from risk denominator)
clientActions.description: Restore compliance for monitoring rule "identity-mfa-enrollment". Target state: 100% of users enrolled in MFA. Current observed state: 72% enrolled. Apply remediation template: identity-access-control.

mitigationPlan.requirementTitle: Mandatory MFA for all privileged and standard users
acceptanceCriteria: 100% of active-eligible users enrolled in MFA within 30 days of account creation (user-account-created states excluded from risk denominator)
Users cannot sign in until MFA device registration is complete — registration prompt enforced at login
Privileged roles use JIT elevation with maximum 4-hour sessions
Guest users blocked from administrative roles
Conditional access policies enforce compliant device state

vendorDeliverableProfile.summary: Microsoft Entra ID and Conditional Access must deliver MFA for all users, JIT for privileged roles, guest restrictions, and compliant-device enforcement per approved parameters.

serviceResponsibilityBoundary.summary: The governance service enforces MFA at login — users cannot access systems until device registration is complete. The client maintains new-user onboarding on-premises; account creation and MFA device registration take time, but access remains blocked until registration succeeds.

serviceObligations.title: MFA enrollment for active-eligible users only
serviceObligations.description: System monitors MFA enrollment against active-eligible users within the 30-day onboarding window. User-account-created and pending-onboarding accounts are excluded from the risk denominator — they should not be active and cannot sign in until MFA registration completes.

serviceObligations.title: Login blocked until MFA device registration complete
serviceObligations.description: System enforces Conditional Access so users cannot sign in without MFA registration. At first login the user is prompted to complete MFA device registration before any system access is granted — no bypass except approved break-glass.

serviceObligations.title: JIT elevation for privileged roles
serviceObligations.description: System enforces and monitors privileged identity management with maximum 4-hour sessions.

serviceObligations.title: Guest user administrative role restriction
serviceObligations.description: System monitors and enforces guest users blocked from administrative roles.

serviceObligations.title: Compliant device conditional access
serviceObligations.description: System monitors conditional access policies requiring compliant device state.

clientPremisesObligations.title: Timebound onboarding (30 days from account creation)
clientPremisesObligations.description: Client-premises timebound onboarding policy: MFA registration must complete within 30 days of account creation. User-account-created accounts are not active, are excluded from FAIR/ALE risk, and cannot sign in until MFA registration completes. Client owns HR provisioning, welcome communications, and helpdesk support during the window.

clientPremisesObligations.title: No password sharing
clientPremisesObligations.description: Client specification: employees must not share credentials. Enforced through HR policy, awareness training, and client operational procedures — not an automated governance monitoring rule.

clientPremisesObligations.title: Delegation and act-on-behalf restrictions
clientPremisesObligations.description: Client defines who may delegate access or act on behalf of others. Remains a client-premises operational specification distinct from MFA technical enforcement.

clientPremisesObligations.title: Credential hygiene awareness programme
clientPremisesObligations.description: Client maintains security awareness covering phishing, credential reuse, and reporting — complementary to technical MFA controls the service provides.
